# National Motor Fest

> National Motor Fest (NMF) builds automotive and motorsports experiences in California — festivals, rallies, burnout competitions, Cars & Caffeine meets, and coming racing and esports events. Slogan: "All Engines. One Movement." If it has an engine, it belongs here.

Contact: contact@nationalmotorfest.com · Call or text (682) 500-5285
Founded by Brandon Stier (Fort Worth, TX); co-owned with Michael Tanore (Paso Robles, CA).

## Upcoming events

- [NMF Rally California '26 + Exotics on Broadway](https://nationalmotorfest.com/nmf-rally): August 15, 2026 — supercar/exotic rally from Porsche San Luis Obispo to Seaside, with staging at Exotics On Broadway during Monterey Car Week. $499 per vehicle, spots very limited. Includes two Exotics On Broadway GA tickets, Aug 14 sticker party, photography/video/drone coverage.
- [NMF3 + NMF Smoke Show](https://nationalmotorfest.com/nmfsmokeshow): October 10, 2026, 11am–7pm at Santa Margarita Ranch, 9000 Yerba Buena Ave, Santa Margarita, CA. Burnout competition, car show, freestyle motocross, vendors, live competitions. All cars welcome.
- NMF Cars & Caffeine: coming late summer 2026 (Paso Robles CA · Fort Worth TX · Daytona Beach FL).
- NMF Racing Events and NMF Esports: coming 2027.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nationalmotorfest.com/): overview and upcoming events
- [NMF Rally](https://nationalmotorfest.com/nmf-rally): rally details, what's included, application
- [NMF Smoke Show](https://nationalmotorfest.com/nmfsmokeshow): tickets, burnout comp and car show registration, vendors
- [NMF Team](https://nationalmotorfest.com/nmfteam): founders and team
- [Contact / Sponsorship](https://nationalmotorfest.com/contact-us): become a sponsor

## Sponsorship

Current and past sponsors include M1 Circuit Racing, TAPS, Coastal Land Services, Rugged Radios, DCR Framing, Porsche San Luis Obispo, Toyota San Luis Obispo, Mercedes-Benz, Chevrolet, SESLOC Federal Credit Union, Firestone Walker, BarrelHouse Brewing Co and more. Sponsorship inquiries: contact@nationalmotorfest.com
